overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian industrial urban area with massive elevated highways, concrete infrastructure, and security checkpoints. The journey progresses from a covered street beneath an overpass through an intersection into an open industrial zone dominated by a distant monolithic skyscraper.

events.description: camera overtakes and passes the character in the red jacket

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the industrial street following a character in a red jacket who moves aside to let the camera pass

notable_agents.action: character in red jacket walking ahead, then stepping aside as the camera passes by on the left

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway running parallel to the street
large cylindrical concrete industrial structures with pipes and scaffolding
tall security fence with barbed wire along the right side of the street
enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character in a red jacket walking down an industrial street flanked by massive concrete towers on the left and an elevated highway structure on the right. The camera moves forward steadily beneath the overpass, passing vehicles on the left, until it overtakes the character who steps aside near the end of the segment.

events.description: turning left at intersection reveals open industrial area with distant skyscraper
crossing the street at the intersection crosswalk

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and crossing the street toward an open industrial zone with a prominent distant skyscraper

entered.detail: tan industrial building covered in red and black graffiti tags
large metal electrical transmission tower with multiple power lines
tall dark monolithic skyscraper dominating the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at an intersection, transitioning from the enclosed street to a more open industrial area. As it crosses the street, a graffiti-covered warehouse appears on the right while a massive transmission tower and distant skyscraper come into view ahead, replacing the previous overhead structures.

events.description: approaching security checkpoint with raised barrier gates and guard truck
quest UI markers appear on screen indicating nearby objectives

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through a security checkpoint area with a large military truck and security barriers

notable_agents.action: security guard in yellow safety vest standing near the checkpoint barrier

entered.detail: low industrial building with horizontal siding and large CYTECH neon signage
raised metal security barriers blocking vehicle access
large black armored truck parked at the checkpoint
illuminated blue and orange CYTECH corporate signage

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a security checkpoint featuring a large CYTECH facility on the right with prominent neon signage. A security truck and raised barriers block the road ahead while a guard in a yellow vest stands nearby. Quest markers appear on the screen as the camera moves through this controlled access zone.

events.description: passing the CYTECH building and entering the industrial pipeline corridor
approaching the overpass structure ahead while passing pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial sidewalk passing various pedestrians and large pipeline structures on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright pink hair and white shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large metal industrial pipes and conduits running along the building wall
tall street lamps with distinctive orange glowing fixtures
elevated highway overpass spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Having passed the security checkpoint, the camera continues along an industrial sidewalk lined with massive pipelines on the right and orange streetlights on the left. Various pedestrians walk along the path, including a person with pink hair, while the distant skyscraper remains visible ahead as the camera approaches another overpass structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that gradually opens into a sprawling urban security zone. It begins by following a character in a red jacket beneath the heavy concrete shadows of an elevated highway and massive towers, moving steadily forward until the camera overtakes the figure. As the camera turns left at an intersection, the enclosed street gives way to a more open industrial landscape where graffiti-covered warehouses and a distant monolithic skyscraper replace the overhead structures. The scene then shifts toward a controlled access zone, passing a CYTECH facility with neon signage and a security checkpoint guarded by a worker in a yellow vest. Finally, the camera glides along an industrial sidewalk lined with massive pipelines and orange streetlights, passing diverse pedestrians as it heads toward another overpass with the skyscraper still looming in the distance.
